---
title: $\{SET\}_{group}$ $Junction$
author: Kyle P Messier
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
link-citations: yes
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: false
    gallery: false
    toc: 1
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---



## [$\color{#588b3e}{\text{Reproducible Research Guide}}$](Reproducible_Research.html)

## [$\color{#588b3e}{\text{R Style Guide}}$](R-Style-guide.html)

## [$\color{#588b3e}{\text{High Performance Computing}}$](Scientific_Computing.html)

## [$\color{#588b3e}{\text{Overleaf} - \LaTeX}$](Overleaf.html)

## [$\color{#588b3e}{\text{Project Management}}$](Project_Management.html)

## [$\color{#588b3e}{\text{SET group logo}}$](SETlogo.html)
